prompt: Break the digital waivers design into implementation issues. Plan at plans/digital-waivers-design.md.

assertions.text: Classifies input as technical design (not PRD or scope doc) and proceeds
Issues reference actual file paths, line numbers, and type signatures from the rangeops codebase

Issues are vertical slices (thin end-to-end), not horizontal layers. Exception: a schema-only issue is acceptable when its tables serve 3+ downstream issues. Service + UI for the same capability must be in one issue.
Each issue targets 1-6 files, hard cap 8. Over 6 is acceptable only when vertical slice integrity demands it.
Issues have explicit dependency ordering — schema before API, API before UI, cross-cutting after what it wires into
Each issue has: What to build, Files to modify/create (with paths), Context (patterns to follow, key types), Acceptance criteria (checkboxes), Verification commands
Overview includes dependency graph (mermaid), execution order table, and plan coverage map
Each issue classified as AFK (agent autonomous) or HITL (needs human review)
